DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by True Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by True Page to decode data)

lists.192: APV Session (Assembly Line testing an After-Sales)

lists.2: Ignition ON and Engine ready to start

lists.0: Stepper not in home position / CP Off
lists.1: Stepper not in home position / CP On
lists.2: Stepper in home position / CP Off
lists.3: Stepper in home position / CP On

lists.0: the bit informs that push change of state
lists.1: the bit informs that push change of state(1)

lists.2: Stepper in home position / CP Off
lists.1: Stepper not in home position / CP On
lists.0: Stepper not in home position / CP Off
lists.3: Stepper in home position / CP On

lists.2: Toggle at every CW scaling request(same as 0)
lists.1: Toggle at every CCW scaling request
lists.0: Toggle at every CW scaling request
lists.3: Toggle at every CCW scaling request (same as 1)

lists.1: on (rear CP lock by front CP)

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
